zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Drewe於1375年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓時，她的父親Thomas Drewe37歲，母親Emma Cary Of Wiltshire25歲。她於大約1392年與Brian de Windsor在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1406年10月1日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾布拉登哈姆享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Drewe于1375年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾素坦普頓时，她的父亲Thomas Drewe37岁，母亲Emma Cary Of Wiltshire25岁。她于大约1392年与Brian de Windsor在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1406年10月1日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾布拉登哈姆享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drewe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Drew
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Drewe was born in 1375, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Drewe, was 37 and her mother, Emma Cary Of Wiltshire, was 25. She married Brian de Windsor about 1392, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 1 October 1406, in Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Drewe est née en 1375, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Drewe, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Emma Cary Of Wiltshire, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Brian de Windsor environ 1392, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1406, à Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Drewe 1375 in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Drewe 37 und ihre Mutter Emma Cary Of Wiltshire 25. Sie hat um 1392 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Brian de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1406 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Drewe è nata il nel 1375 nel Southampton, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Drewe, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Emma Cary Of Wiltshire, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Brian de Windsor circa 1392, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 ottobre 1406, nel Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Dreweが1375年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Dreweは37歳，母Emma Cary Of Wiltshireは25歳であった。約1392年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでBrian de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1406年10月1日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブラデンハムで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Drewe(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Drewe(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Cary Of Wiltshire(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Brian de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 10월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 브라데함에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Drewe nasceu em 1375, em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Drewe, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Emma Cary Of Wiltshire, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Brian de Windsor aproximadamente 1392, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1406, em Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Drewe родилась в 1375 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Drewe было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Cary Of Wiltshire, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Brian de Windsor около 1392 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 октября 1406 г. в местности браденам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Drewe nació en 1375, en Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Drewe, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Emma Cary Of Wiltshire, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Brian de Windsor aproximadamente 1392, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de octubre de 1406, en Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
